title: OKX Ventures, HashKey back VPBank-linked CAEX for Vietnam crypto pilot push
message_html: OKX Ventures, HashKey back VPBank-linked CAEX for Vietnam crypto pilot push ...
snippet: OKX Ventures and HashKey are buying into VPBank-backed CAEX as Vietnam’s strict crypto pilot pushes offshore exchanges toward a high-bar, onshore licensing regime.
